message:
Add OCSF Introduction document

Integrate the "Understanding OCSF" overview document from the ocsf-docs
repository as a new Introduction page in the OCSF reference. This
comprehensive guide covers OCSF taxonomy, personas, attributes, event
classes, categories, profiles, and extensions.

Changes:
- Add fetchOverview() to ocsf-client.mjs to fetch understanding-ocsf.md
- Add parseOverview() and generateOverviewPage() to process the document
- Update syncDocs() in sync-ocsf.mjs to sync the overview file
- Add Introduction as the first card in the OCSF Resources grid
- Include Introduction link in the OCSF sidebar
- Remove redundant "Official OCSF Site" card (link already in intro text)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1287,6 +1287,42 @@ ${articles.map((a) => `- [${a.title}](/reference/ocsf/articles/${a.slug})`).join
 `;
 }
 
+// =============================================================================
+// Overview/Introduction
+// =============================================================================
+
+/**
+ * Parse overview file into {title, content}.
+ */
+export function parseOverview(content) {
+  // Extract title from first H1 or use default
+  const titleMatch = content.match(/^#\s+(.+)$/m);
+  const title = titleMatch ? titleMatch[1] : "Understanding OCSF";
+
+  // Remove the H1 title from content (Starlight uses frontmatter title)
+  // Use multiline mode to match H1 that may not be at position 0
+  // Also fix malformed markdown links with double parentheses: [text]((url)) -> [text](url)
+  // And escape angle brackets that would be interpreted as JSX tags
+  const contentWithoutTitle = escapeAngleBracketsForMdx(
+    content.replace(/^#\s+.+\n/m, "").replace(/\]\(\(([^)]+)\)\)/g, "]($1)"),
+  );
+
+  return { title, content: contentWithoutTitle };
+}
+
+/**
+ * Generate overview page MDX with title "Introduction".
+ */
+export function generateOverviewPage(overview) {
+  return (
+    generateFrontmatter({
+      title: "Introduction",
+      description:
+        "Comprehensive guide to OCSF concepts including taxonomy, personas, attributes, event classes, categories, profiles, and extensions.",
+    }) + overview.content
+  );
+}
+
 // =============================================================================
 // Main Index Page
 // =============================================================================
